overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character walking through a modern urban plaza resembling La Défense in Paris. The character navigates past mixed-era architecture including concrete apartment blocks and contemporary glass buildings, approaching the distinctive curved Hilton CNIT building under bright sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza between concrete and brick buildings

events.description: character initiates left turn to change walking direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a paved plaza with a gray concrete building on the right and red brick building visible to the left

entered.detail: multi-story concrete apartment block with small windows
historic red brick warehouse with gabled roof
slender modern glass tower reflecting sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward through an open plaza, passing a gray concrete building on the right with a red brick building visible in the distance to the left. The environment is sunny and empty, with a tall glass skyscraper rising in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with modern glass architecture

events.description: large white text overlay reading 'WESTFIELD CNIT' appears across the screen

agents.ego_description: turned left and walking across the open plaza toward the curved Hilton CNIT building

entered.detail: large curved glass building with Hilton logo and CNIT signage
low-rise white concrete structure with horizontal lines
dark rectangular skyscraper with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the character walks across a wide open plaza toward the distinctive curved Hilton CNIT building. The white modern structure passes by on the left while the text 'WESTFIELD CNIT' briefly appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved pedestrian ramp alongside Hilton CNIT

agents.ego_description: walking up a curved concrete ramp alongside the glass facade of the Hilton building

entered.detail: sweeping curved walkway leading up to the building entrance
distinctive curved skyscraper with sail-like profile

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a curved concrete ramp that leads alongside the Hilton CNIT building, with the massive curved glass facade now dominating the left side of the frame. The sail-shaped tower becomes visible in the distance as the character continues walking along the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban plaza that transitions from a mix of concrete blocks to the sweeping curves of modern architecture. It begins with the character walking forward past a gray concrete building and a distant red brick structure, with a tall glass skyscraper looming in the background. As the character turns left, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the white, modern form of the Hilton CNIT building begins to glide past on the left. The camera then follows the character as they ascend a curved concrete ramp, causing the massive curved glass facade to dominate the frame. Finally, the perspective shifts to reveal a sail-shaped tower in the distance while continuing along the length of the building.
